title: CompactionManager — intake request schema, provider taxonomy, and anomaly contracts
description: A discriminated union for the single-intake CompactionRequest (evaluate / compact / anchorCommitted / enrich), each carrying origin + structured cause + provider class; the 3-class provider taxonomy; the per-session serialization key; and the anomaly-event contract. Types describe the manager's surface; executors (run, publish, enrichment) are unchanged and not re-specified here.

RequestOrigin.description: Stable call-site id, for accountability. Examples below mirror the §5 inventory.

StructuredCause.description: The measured signal values that justified the request — RCA material (DD-7), not a freeform string.

ProviderClass.description: 3-class taxonomy the manager branches on (DD-8). Code's resolvePolicy is 2-way (claude-cli vs general); codex is general + stateful SS-chain overlay.

semantics.claude: claude-cli; SL chain (chain-reset is SL-noop); CLAUDE_NOOP_OBSERVED skips rebind/provider-switched/continuation-invalidated; absolute aFloor enrichment gate; coldCacheBGate; by-token 1M.
semantics.codex: GeneralPolicy + stateful SS chain (invalidateContinuationFamily real; SS-break); item-count overflow; dormant /responses/compact ai_free; often subscription.
semantics.general: copilot/other; GeneralPolicy + SL chain (chain-reset no-op); by-request billing → forceRich straight-to-ai_paid.

TriggerSignals.description: Raw measurements a reporter hands the manager so the manager (not the caller) decides the observed condition.

SerializationKey.description: Dedup is structural: one execution per session, one enrichment per anchor.

CompactionAnomaly.description: First-class policy-violation events (siblings of session.rebind_storm); each names the offending origin so the fix lands at the source.

notes: Executors (run, publishCompactedAndResetChain, drop_old/ai_paid) are reused unchanged (DD-5); this schema covers only the manager's intake + policy + accountability surface.
hybridEnrichInFlight is removed — its job is subsumed by SerializationKey.enrichmentKey dedup (DD-2).
